titleStmt.title: SII 17.540: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 540. (A.R. No. 498 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date given are Mithuṉa ba. 5, Wednesday, Śōdi (Svāti). The combination of ba. 5 and Svāti is impossible in the month of Mithuṉa.

This records the gift of 1(1/2) vēli and 1 mā of land made free of taxes fixed by rāja-niyōgam, nāṭṭuvivattai (vyavasthai), ūr-vivattai, etc., as tirunandāviḷakkupuṟam, by Pāṅganvāy-uḍaiyāṉ alias Rājarāja-mūvēndavēḷāṉ, of Kiḷiyūr for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār, in Umbaḷa-nāḍu.

In detailing the boundaries of the land the record mentions a piece of land sold by the donor to Āḷuḍai Nāchchi Amudāḻvi, (a dēvaraḍiyār), and a piece of land leased to Arindavaṉ Pallavaraiyaṉ by Chittarāyan.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī [rājā]dhirājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu mituṉa nāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattup pañcamiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa coti nāḷ Umpaḷa nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku Innāṭṭuk kiḷiyūril pāṅkanvāyuṭai yāṉ
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kiṭaṅkaṉāṉa rā[ja*]rā[ja*] muventaveḷāṉ vaitta tirunontā viḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkiḷiyūril Eṉkāṇiyāṉa nilattu viṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟ kellai cittarāyar kāṇiyāy Arintavaṉ pallavarayaṉ paṟṟi yiṟuttu varukiṟa nilat tukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai
karaippulattellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Āḷuṭainācci Amutāḻvikku nāṉ viṟṟa nilamāy Innāyaṉāṟku Ivaḷ tirunontāviḷakkup puṟamāka viṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai miṇṭaṉ vāykkālukkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi 5 100- ṉāl nilamvam Itaṉ kiḻakku
iṭaiviṭṭu viṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai cittarāyar kāṇiyāy Arintavaṉ pallavarayaṉ paṟṟi Iṟuttu varukiṟa nilattu(varukiṟa nilattukku) meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai karaip pil Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cittarāyar kāṇiyā yarintavaṉ pallavarayaṉ paṟṟi Iṟukkiṟa nilattukku kiḻakkum va
ṭapāṟkellai miṇṭaṉ vāykkālukkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi 2 100 5 10 ṉāl nilam�m māṉavār karaippulattu viṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai vaṭukaṉṟeṉ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai vaṭukanṟeṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai Amutāḻvi nilamāy Ivaṉ viṭṭa nilat
kkum vaṭapāṟkellai nilattellaikkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi 7 100 5 10- ṉāl nilamva� kuḷattu nāṟṟaṅkālāka viṭṭa kuḻi 5 10ṉāl nilam�m Āka nta�m Ivvūrttevara ṭiyāril Āḷuṭai nācci Amutā
ḻvi vaitta tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkiḷiyūril Eṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭu ṭaiya nilam va� viṭṭa kāraṭi nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai Inta Irācarā camuventaveḷāṉeṉ tirunontāviḷakkuppuṟamāka viṭṭa nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai karaippula Ellaikku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai tikka llaikkum karumāṇikka viṇṇakarāḻvār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam rā[ja*]rā[ja*] muventaveḷāṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai miṇṭaṉ vāykkālukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi
karaippulattu viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Inta rā[ja*]rā[ja*] muventaveḷāṉ tiru nontāviḷakkuppuṟamāka viṭṭa nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyāṉ kāṇi yāṉa nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cittarāyar kāṇiyā yarintavaṉ pallavarayaṉ
paṟṟiyiṟuttu varukiṟa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kāraṭi nilattellaikkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi 7 100 5 10ṉāl va�m Āka nilam nta�m Āka nilam 10 5pa Innilam Oṉṟaraiye Oru māvum Innāyaṉāṟkut tirunāmattu
kkāṇiyāka Iṟaiyili ceytamaiyil Inta nilattukku Ūrtarappaṭi nellu Aṟukalaṉe Iru tūṇikkuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻiyum muvuḻakkum Innilattāl vanta kaṭamai kuṭimaikaḷ Irāca niyokamum nāṭṭu vivattai Ūrvivattai
paṭiyum vanta kaṭamai kuṭimai Epperp paṭṭaṉavum Ivvāṇṭu mutal Ivvūril Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattile Eṟṟi Iṟukkakkaṭavatākavum Ivvūril Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilam Eṉ pakkal ṟṟuṭaiyārum koṇṭuṭaiyā(ṉa)
rum pirāttikaḷāl peṟuvārum nila viḻukkāṭṭuppaṭiye Eṟṟi Iṟukkakkaṭavarāka cetu kuṭuttu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi c(ā)mmatittu Iṉṉilam 10 5pam tiru nontāviḷakkuppuṟamāka viṭṭu Iṟaiyili
ceytu kuṭutteṉ pāṅkanvāyuṭaiyāṉāṉa rājarāja muventa veḷāṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 17.540 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
